infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Netra uses the camera to capture incident report photos and location verification pings during your shift.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Netra uses your location to verify clock-ins, geofence patrols, and send location pings to your supervisor during active shifts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Netra uses your location in the background during active shifts to send periodic location pings to your supervisor for safety monitoring.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Netra may save report photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Netra saves photos you capture during incident reports.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Netr uses Face ID for secure biometric login.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Netra does not record audio. This permission is required by the camera module.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Netra monitors your location during shifts for geofence compliance.

plugins.cameraPermission: Netra uses the camera for clock-in verification and reports.
